title: AN ACT NAMING AS THE âPRESIDENT CORAZON C. AQUINO AVENUEâ THE CIRCUMFERENCIAL ROAD WHICH COMMENCES AT THE JUNCTION OF THE ILOILO-DUMANGAS AS COASTAL ROAD IN BALABAGO JARO DISTRICT, ILOILO CITY, THEN FOLLOWS A GENERAL WESTWARD DIRECTION ALONG THE FLOODWAYS SOUTH BANK TOWARDS BUHANG, JARO; TACAS, JARO AND UNGKA II, PAVIA THEN TRAVERSES SOUTHWARDS TO THE MANDURRIAO DISTRICT, ILOILO CITY-PAVIA-SAN MIGUEL, TRI-BORDER, AND ENDS AT THE ILOILO-ANTIQUE ROAD, NEAR THE CENTER OF AREVALO DISTRICT, ILOILO CITY

chunks.text:
H. No. 4400; Manila Bulletin (Jul 8 2015); 111 OG No. 33, 4806 (August 17, 2015)

[ REPUBLIC ACT No. 10663, July 03, 2015 ]

AN ACT NAMING AS THE âPRESIDENT CORAZON C. AQUINO AVENUEâ THE CIRCUMFERENCIAL ROAD WHICH COMMENCES AT THE JUNCTION OF THE ILOILO-DUMANGAS AS COASTAL ROAD IN BALABAGO JARO DISTRICT, ILOILO CITY, THEN FOLLOWS A GENERAL WESTWARD DIRECTION ALONG THE FLOODWAYS SOUTH BANK TOWARDS BUHANG, JARO; TACAS, JARO AND UNGKA II, PAVIA THEN TRAVERSES SOUTHWARDS TO THE MANDURRIAO DISTRICT, ILOILO CITY-PAVIA-SAN MIGUEL, TRI-BORDER, AND ENDS AT THE ILOILO-ANTIQUE ROAD, NEAR THE CENTER OF AREVALO DISTRICT, ILOILO CITY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. A four (4)-lane circumferential road that spans 14.3217 kilometers and commences at the junction of the Iloilo-Dumangas Coastal Road in Balabago, Jaro District, Iloilo City then follows a general westward directions along the floodwayâs south bank towards Buhang Jaro; Tacas, Jaro and Ungka II, Pavia, then traverses southwards to the Mandurriao District, Iloilo City-Pavia-San Miguel tri-border, and ends at the Iloilo-Antique Road, near the center of Arevalo District, Iloilo City, shall be named as the âPresident Corazon C. Aquino Aveâ.

SECTION 2. The Department of Public Works and Highways shall issue the necessary rules, orders and circulars to implement the provisions of this Act.

SEC. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in a newspaper of general circulation.

(SGD.) FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

(SGD.) FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on June 9, 2014 and June 1, 2015, respectively.

(SGD.) OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: JULY 03, 2015

(SGD) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
